title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Phone Settings Button(Android)
scenario: Tapping Phone Settings button from Device Home Screen with no device connected does not navigate to Bluetooth settings page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure no device is connected (Home screen shows "No Device Connected" or similar).
3. On the Home screen, locate and tap the Phone Settings button (gear icon or labeled button).
expected: The app navigates to the device's Bluetooth settings page.
